releaseNotes.zh-CN:
DataWhere 1.0.0 首个正式版发布！

- 插件化数据源架构，支持 MySQL、Redis、Kafka 三大数据源接入
- MySQL 5.6.x ~ 8.4.x：数据库浏览与只读 SQL 查询
- Redis 5.x ~ 7.x：Key 浏览和值查看
- Kafka 2.8.x ~ 3.6.x：Topic 浏览和消息查看
- 全局搜索：一个搜索框，跨数据源类型、跨连接实例统一检索
- 数据源管理：统一管理所有数据源连接，支持配置分享
- 元数据同步：自动同步数据源元数据到本地索引
- 跨平台支持：Windows、macOS、Linux
- Ed25519 数字签名验证，严格只读模式保障数据安全
releaseNotes.en-US:
DataWhere 1.0.0 initial release!

- Pluggable data source architecture with MySQL, Redis, and Kafka support
- MySQL 5.6.x ~ 8.4.x: database browsing and read-only SQL queries
- Redis 5.x ~ 7.x: key browsing and value inspection
- Kafka 2.8.x ~ 3.6.x: topic browsing and message viewing
- Global search: one search box across data source types and connections
- Data source management: unified connection management with config sharing
- Metadata sync: automatic metadata indexing to local storage
- Cross-platform support: Windows, macOS, Linux
- Ed25519 digital signature verification and strict read-only mode for data security
